zh.Lyme Regis, Dorset, England: 英國多瑟特萊 雷吉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Beaumont於大約1502年出生在英國多瑟特萊 雷吉時，她的父親Henry Beaumont28歲，母親Elizabeth Stowell22歲。她和Robert Coker至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。她去世於1550年在英國多瑟特馬普德享年49歲。

zh-hans.Lyme Regis, Dorset, England: 英国多瑟特萊 雷吉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Beaumont于大约1502年出生在英国多瑟特萊 雷吉时，她的父亲Henry Beaumont28岁，母亲Elizabeth Stowell22岁。她和Robert Coker至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。她去世于1550年在英国多瑟特馬普德享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Beaumont was born about 1502, in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, her father, Henry Beaumont, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth Stowell, was 22. She had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Robert Coker. She died in 1550, in Mappowder, Dorset, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Beaumont est née environ 1502, à Lyme Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Henry Beaumont, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Stowell, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Robert Coker. Elle est décédée en 1550, à Mappowder, Dorset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Beaumont um 1502 in Lyme Regis, Dorset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Beaumont 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Stowell 22. Sie hatte mit Robert Coker mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Mappowder, Dorset, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Beaumont è nata il circa 1502 nel Lyme Regis, Dorset, England, sua padre, Henry Beaumont, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Stowell, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Robert Coker. Morì nel 1550, nel Mappowder, Dorset, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Beaumontが約1502年にイギリスドールセトリメ レジスで生まれた時，父Henry Beaumontは28歳，母Elizabeth Stowellは22歳であった。彼女はRobert Cokerとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1550年にイギリスドールセトマップオウダーで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Beaumont(이)가 대략 1502년 영국 도르세트 림 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Beaumont(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Stowell(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Robert Coker(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 영국 도르세트 마포우더에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Beaumont nasceu aproximadamente 1502, em Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Beaumont, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Stowell, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Robert Coker. Ela faleceu em 1550, em Mappowder, Dorset, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Beaumont родилась около 1502 г. в местности лим регис, дорсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Beaumont было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Stowell, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Robert Coker. Она умерла в 1550 г. в местности маппоудир, дорсет, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Beaumont nació aproximadamente 1502, en Lyme Regis, Dorset, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry Beaumont, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Stowell, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Robert Coker. Murió en 1550, en Mappowder, Dorset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
